ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-31-2023 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Partial Allowance Of Compensation (Estate Administered Without Court Supervision)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Frank Antonini appearing in person for Daniel Trump (petitioner).

Mr. Antonini stated that they withdraw the request for partial allowance and fees. Petition for preliminary distribution and partial allowance of compensation is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Svahlin. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-20-2022 is admitted to probate. Daniel P. Trump is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-31-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported
